# Travel Rules
> AI-powered travel assistant app for van lifers, campers, road trippers and backpackers.

Travel Rules is a free iOS app that helps travellers plan trips, pack smart, and stay informed about travel rules and entry requirements for each country. Built for van life, camping, road trips and backpacking adventures.

## App
- iOS App: https://apps.apple.com/app/travel-rules/id6451070215
- Platform: iOS (iPhone & iPad)
- Price: Free
- Category: Travel
- Languages: Polish, English, Spanish

## Features
- AI trip planner — conversational AI travel assistant for route planning'
- Country travel rules — entry requirements, camping laws, visa info
- Packing checklist — customisable lists for van life and road trips
- GPS map — offline-capable map for campers and van lifers
- Works offline — essential for remote travel without internet

## Target audience
Van lifers, campers, road trippers, backpackers, digital nomads, families travelling by camper van

## Keywords
van life, vanlife, kamper, road trip, camping, AI trip planner, travel planner, packing list, travel rules, entry requirements, wild camping, backpacking, digital nomad

## Pricing
- Free tier: 3 AI questions/day, 5 tips/day
- Trip Pass: $1.99 (7 days full access)
- Premium Monthly: $4.99/month
- Premium Annual: $29.99/year

## Website sections
- Homepage: https://travelrules.eu/
- App landing page: https://travelrules.eu/app/
- Travel Planner tool: https://travelrules.eu/planer/
- Ebook (camper trip prep): https://travelrules.eu/ebook/
- Blog (van life guides): https://travelrules.eu/blog/

- Ebook (PL): https://www.naffy.io/travelrules
- Travel Planner PDF: https://travelrules.gumroad.com/l/travelplanner_checklist_print
- Vanlife Checklist: https://travelrules.gumroad.com/l/VanlifeTravelChecklist
